benefits.description: Feels better at 5 IU than at 4.5 IU after initial adaptation period

side_effects.description: More water retention than wanted at 5 IU; dropped to 4.5 IU which made a significant difference; returning to 5 IU caused mild increase in water for 4 days that then subsided

protocol_notes: Started at 5 IU, had water retention sides, dropped to 4.5 IU for a month, returned to 5 IU for last week. Plans to try 6 IU in February at end of bulking cycle, then drop to 3-4 IU for maintenance, possibly 4-5 IU for cut.
